programmes.show_description: Joining Radio 5 Live.
The best bits from the past seven days of the BBC's Scottish news podcast, with Martin Geissler.
An act of worship by The Very Reverend John Conway, Provost of St Mary's Episcopal Cathedral Edinburgh.
Tony's This Spiritual Life guest is An American Marriage author: Tayari Jones.
News, discussion and interviews from politics and beyond.
Falkirk host Rangers in their final Scottish Premiership match before the split, and all the action is live on Sportsound.
The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
Join Gary as he shares your special messages and dedications and plays your favourite Scottish Music requests.
Music by Korngold and De Falla sits alongside Mendelssohn's rarely heard concerto for two pianos, and John Butt plays Bach.
Settle in as Roddy Hart plays handpicked tracks, breakthrough artists, and fresh sounds to close out the weekend.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
News from across Scotland and the world, plus sport, weather, entertainment and big name interviews.
Connie McLaughlin gets to the heart of the stories making the news.
News updates from Scotland and beyond, plus all your lunchtime sport, travel and weather.
Nicola Meighan brings you feel-good music and chat with celebrity guests.
Kerr Mercer's Love Me Twice is Len's Arts Mixtape, and Gene Kelly's widow Patricia Ward Kelly and Scottish Ballet's Christopher Hampson talk about Scottish Ballet's Starstruck.
Breaking down the day's talking points with comment and opinion, plus sport, travel and weather.
A party election broadcast by the Scottish Liberal Democrats for the Scottish Parliament Election on Thursday the 7th of May 2026.

programmes.show_name: Get It On with Bryan Burnett
programmes.show_description: On tonight's show, we want to hear about the bands who have a number in their name. We could head in One Direction along with 10,000 Maniacs and end up with S Club 7!
Vic has new music from The Twilight Sad and Pictish Trail, and Scottish classics from The Delgados and The Rezillos. Parallel Lines features the Small Faces and Led Zeppelin.
The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.
